The '''Zel system''',<ref name="PP" /> also called the '''Zeltros system''',<ref name="Atlas" /> was a five-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]] that contained the planet of [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]].<ref name="PP" /> A [[Battle of the Zel system|battle]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] was fought here as a part of [[Mandalorian Triumph]].<ref name="Atlas" />

==Appearances==
*{{CWACite|8|One of a Kind (comic story)}} {{Flash}}
*[[Legacy (2006) 43|''Legacy'' (2006) 43]]
